criteria.reasoning: The main parts are there and mostly in order: an introduction with your role, three counter-arguments, a short bridge, and two own arguments before the conclusion. A third own argument and a fuller bridge would round out the shape.
evidence: As a member of the works council at NorthStar Logistics AG, I want to give my view on the new AI tools.
In the end, I think we should agree to the tools if the company trains everyone and sets fair rules.

criteria.reasoning: Four of the arguments bring claim, reason and example together, so they count in full. The third counter-argument and the bridge stand as a claim on their own, so they do not count yet under the all-or-nothing rule.
evidence: for example the scanning of parcels at gate two, which two workers do all day
such as a wrong postcode, before a parcel leaves the depot

criteria.reasoning: Structures and tenses are mostly steady across the comment, with only small slips in the longer sentences.
